title: Air Fryer Liners - Disposable Non-Stick Parchment Paper - for Most Fryers (20 cm Round - 50 Pack)
features: Use these disposible round air fryer liners to help prevent food from sticking, and make clean up easier. They will also help keep the air fryer in top condition with minimal cleaning.
The liners are pre-cut, oil proof, non-stick and heat resistant up to 230 degrees.
Pack comes with 50 or 80 liners that will fit easily into most types of round air fryers.
Simply place liner into air fryer and use as normal. Dispose of the liner after use.
description: Create perfect fried treats every time with these Air Fryer Liners. Made from high-quality greaseproof paper, these disposable liners come in a variety of shapes - round, rectangle, or square, to fit your air fryer perfectly. The non-stick surface coating ensures that your food won't stick, making cleanup a breeze. Ideal for use with most air fryers, these liners are perfect for baking, grilling, and frying all your favourite foods. They are a must-have for any home cook looking to streamline their cooking process. Say goodbye to messy cleanups and hello to perfectly cooked food every time with these Air Fryer Liners.
